content:
# Silver Rewards Card Terms

## Customer Fit
1. Present the Silver Rewards Card only when the customer meets the minimum income requirement of 55000 and the minimum credit tier of good.
2. Use this card for customers comparing a no-frills rewards product with defined category earn rates, an annual fee of 0, and a purchase APR of 24.99.
3. If the customer may qualify for multiple cards, compare this page with "Bronze Rewards Card Terms" and "Gold Rewards Card Terms" before making a recommendation.

## Rewards and Card Costs
| Feature | Silver Rewards Card term |
|---|---:|
| Everyday cashback | 1.5 |
| Groceries cashback | 2.0 |
| Dining cashback | 2.0 |
| Travel cashback | 1.5 |
| Sustainable purchases cashback | 1.2 |
| Crypto purchases cashback | 0.5 |
| Foreign transaction fee | 2.0 |

## Balance Transfers and Plus Bonus
The balance transfer introductory period is 6. Do not describe any other introductory pricing, transfer deadline, or transfer cap unless it is documented in another approved card article. Customers with Rho Bank Plus receive an additional bonus of 0.1 on this card. For side-by-side pricing and rewards details, see "Credit Card Fee Apr Rewards Matrix"; for choosing among eligible products, see "Internal: Credit Card Recommendation Policy".
title: Silver Rewards Card Terms
